narrative:
Rossford Ex Vill Sd (Wood) exempted village school district has 9,693 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.8 percentage points.
